/usr/bin/ar qc libmeshmonk_lib.a CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/BaseCorrespondenceFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/CorrespondenceFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/Downsampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/InlierDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/NeighbourFinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/NonrigidRegistration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/PyramidNonrigidRegistration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/RigidRegistration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/RigidTransformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/ScaleShifter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/SymmetricCorrespondenceFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/ViscoElasticTransformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/helper_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_lib.dir/src/meshmonk.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmeshmonk_lib.a
